name: Crockpot Chili Sirloin
recipeIngredient: 1 Jalapeno pepper (remove seeds if you don't like it hot)
1 28 oz. can of tomato sauce or 1 28 oz. can of whole tomatoes chopped
recipeInstructions:
This recipe works great in a slow cooker for approximately 8 hours. If you don't have a slow cooker, cook on low for at least 2 hours.
1. Slightly brown the steak cubes in the bacon fat, then drain.
2. Add remaining ingredients and simmer as mentioned above.
3. Top with shredded cheddar cheese and raw onions before serving.
